summary: Iteration 20: Comprehensive testing of 3 new features - P&L Summary Card on Dashboard, Mill Parts Stock module, Daily Report. All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing confirmed all features working correctly with proper data-testid attributes.

1_pnl_summary_card_on_dashboard.description: Profit & Loss Summary Card showing Income, Expenses, and Net Profit on Dashboard tab

test_results.card_visible: PASS - Card visible on Dashboard tab
test_results.income_displayed: PASS - Shows ₹1,00,000 Total Income with MSP, By-Product, Cash Jama breakdown
test_results.expenses_displayed: PASS - Shows ₹10,000 Total Expenses with FRK, Gunny, Cash Nikasi breakdown
test_results.net_profit_displayed: PASS - Shows ₹90,000 NET PROFIT in green
test_results.api_returns_valid_json: PASS - Returns income, expenses, net_pnl, profit fields

2_mill_parts_stock_module.description: New Mill Parts tab with Stock Summary, Transactions, and Parts Master sub-tabs

test_results.tab_visible: PASS - Mill Parts tab visible in navigation
test_results.page_loads: PASS - Mill Parts page loads correctly
test_results.sub_tabs_work: PASS - All 3 sub-tabs (Summary, Transactions, Parts Master) work
test_results.stock_summary_shows_parts: PASS - Shows 3 sample parts (Bearing, Belt, Sieve) with stock_in, used, current_stock
test_results.parts_master_shows_list: PASS - Shows parts list with Category, Unit, Min Stock columns
test_results.add_part_dialog_works: PASS - Dialog opens with Part Name, Category, Unit, Min Stock fields
test_results.stock_in_dialog_works: PASS - Dialog opens with Date, Part, Quantity, Rate, Party, Bill No fields
test_results.export_excel_works: PASS - Excel export endpoint returns spreadsheet
test_results.export_pdf_works: PASS - PDF export endpoint returns PDF
test_results.low_stock_alert: PASS - Shows 'Low Stock 3 parts' warning when below min_stock

3_daily_report.description: Daily Report as 3rd sub-tab under Reports with date picker, sections, and export

test_results.tab_visible: PASS - Daily Report tab visible as 3rd sub-tab in Reports
test_results.content_loads: PASS - Daily Report content loads correctly
test_results.date_picker_works: PASS - Date picker visible and functional
test_results.sections_displayed: PASS - Shows Paddy Entries, Cash Flow, Payments Summary, Mill Parts sections
test_results.cash_flow_shows_data: PASS - Shows Bank Jama ₹50,000 from existing cash book entry
test_results.mill_parts_section: PASS - Shows '1 in / 1 used' from existing stock transactions
test_results.export_excel_works: PASS - Excel export endpoint returns spreadsheet
test_results.export_pdf_works: PASS - PDF export endpoint returns PDF

4_reports_tab_sub_tabs.description: Verify Reports tab has 3 sub-tabs: CMR vs DC, Season P&L, Daily Report

sample_data_in_db.cash_book: Bank Jama ₹50,000 (Rice Payment from Shyam Traders)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 tested 3 new features: P&L Summary Card on Dashboard (uses /api/reports/season-pnl), Mill Parts Stock module with CRUD operations and export, Daily Report sub-tab under Reports. All features working correctly. Previous iteration 19 completed code refactoring with backend split into route modules and frontend component extraction.
